# shelly_em1data_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The ID of the EM1Data component instance.
- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `total_act_energy` (Number) Total active energy, Wh
- `total_act_ret_energy` (Number) Total active returned energy, Wh
